mapper.select: SELECT * FROM destination WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(category) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO destination(name, scene_type, category, rating, description, latitude, longitude) VALUES(#{name}, #{sceneType}, #{category}, #{rating}, #{description}, #{latitude}, #{longitude})
mapper.update: UPDATE destination SET name = #{name}, scene_type = #{sceneType}, category = #{category}, rating = #{rating}, description = #{description}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude} WHERE id = #{id}
